name: chess-analysis
description: Free, browser-based chess.com game review and tactics trainer. In-browser Stockfish analysis with chess.com-style move classification (Brilliant/Great/Best/Book/Inaccuracy/Mistake/Blunder), accuracy %, estimated ratings, eval bar & graph, plus a Lichess puzzle trainer and a 'train your own mistakes' mode. No premium account, no backend — hosted on GitHub Pages.
